Alright, I'm going to admit it. I was tempted this time to show up with military fatigues and like an M16, but I didn't want the anti-gun people to hate me, so I didn't do it. But here's the deal. What I'm going to talk about in this upcoming interview question is what to do with the dream-stompers of the world. The people who want to stomp on your hopes and dreams for a better life for you and those that you care about. What do you do with those people? I hate them. Sometimes I want to say I want to shoot them, but I at least want to get them as far away from me as possible. Well, guess what? In the real world of life, sales, and business, it's not always so easy. So in this lesson, I'm going to share with you some very powerful strategies that will allow you to essentially remove as many of the dream-stompers from your life as possible on a permanent basis. And those people who you can't remove is a way to deal with them as well. So let's go to the interview now and I'll meet you on the other side. Somewhere along the way, someone's going to be in front of you saying, that's ridiculous, that's not going to work. How do you deal with those people? The dream-stompers I call them, right? The Downing Thomas, the naysayers. They're always out there. And it's very interesting because I'm a big believer in removing the dream-stompers from my life and you're moving them from your life and you're moving them from your life, right? Is to get those Downing Thomases out of your life as soon as quickly as possible. That being said, very often we can't because those people might be part of our family. They might even be our spouses or our girlfriends or our parents. You can't actually remove them. So here's the trick. It's really a two-part trick. Part one is that you go to the person who's, you know, you can't get rid of them in your life. Well, let me back up. If you can get rid of them, get rid of them. If there's people who are your dream-stompers and they're telling you you can't achieve and you're not meant for greatness, I would just honestly ex those people off my roll decks, delete them from my phone, get them out of my email and just I would lose their numbers. And I would surround myself. I choose to surround myself with people who believe in me, people who want to empower me, people who are really living the same type of high quality, high-purpose life that I am. Those are the people I want to surround myself with. But if they happen to be your wife or your parents, what I would say is go to them and say, listen, I'm working really hard on something. I'm going in a great direction and I understand you might not really believe in it yet. You might not buy into it yet, but just do me a favor. For the next 90 days, every time you're about to say something negative to me, just don't. Just write it down and save it. And on the 91st day, you can destroy me. Just give me 90 days. And here's why. Because what happens is this, at this point, I could be around all the doubting Thomas' I want and no one's going to shake my belief in myself and my vision for my future and where I'm going because I have so many anchor experiences telling me that, yeah, I'm right. I'm on path. This is good. So I'm very certain about my path in life. In the beginning, when you're not that certain, that's when you're vulnerable. When you cross over to this point, you start getting some real successes, no one can shake you. And you actually, the one that you can turn the doubting Thomas, you can turn the dream stomper into a positive person. And then you're giving them a huge gift. So I say, try to, if you can't get them out permanently, if they're in your family or your spouse, whatever, at least try to silence them temporarily. Tell them to write it all down and kill you on the 91st day. But hopefully by the 91st day, you've already achieved some success. You have something to show them. They'll essentially offset and block them from being able to essentially negatively influence you. So that's what I do. All right. Good stuff, right? I'm sure you hate these people, these dream stompers as much as I do. But again, it's not always so simple. They might be members of your family. They might be relatives. They could be a partner. So when you just can't remove or excise out of your existence. But again, remember the key here. The key distinction is that once you have some success behind you, you start developing these anchors, these belief anchors that, wow, I am going to actually achieve greatness this time. I am going to get to my vision. And once you start getting those anchors in place, you become unflat-bull and you can actually get to where I am, which is I can take a dream stomper and actually use my energy to overpower their negative energy and turn them positive. But in the beginning, don't try that. Let's just get them away as quickly as you can. And that's that. Take your quiz. Go through exercises. See you in the next lesson.
